headline: Couple's 'Date Night' Is Eating Takeout In Silence While Scrolling Their Phones, Then Going To Bed
summary: They've been 'dating' for 2 years. They communicate via Instagram tags. Their therapist is 'concerned.'
fullBody: Megan and Jake PhoneDating have perfected 'parallel play.' They sit together, scroll separately, and 'share' memes via DM — from across the couch. 'We're connected,' Megan said. 'Digitally,' Jake added. Their therapist asked them to 'talk.' They texted each other about it. 'It's efficient,' Megan said. Their friends have never seen them speak. 'I think they're fine,' one said. 'I think they're strangers,' another said.
